name: design-system-supabase
title: Supabase
description: Open-source Firebase alternative. Dark emerald theme, code-first.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 开源的 Firebase 替代方案。深翠绿主题，代码优先。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 開源的 Firebase 替代方案。深翠綠主題，程式碼優先。
description_i18n.ja: オープンソースのFirebase代替。ダークエメラルドテーマ、コードファースト。
description_i18n.ko: 오픈소스 Firebase 대안. 다크 에메랄드 테마, 코드 우선.
description_i18n.fr: Alternative open source à Firebase. Thème émeraude sombre, orienté code.
description_i18n.ru: Open-source альтернатива Firebase. Темная изумрудная тема, code-first.
description_i18n.es: Alternativa open-source a Firebase. Tema verde esmeralda oscuro, orientado al código.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Alternativa open-source ao Firebase. Tema verde esmeralda escuro, focado em código.
description_i18n.it: Alternativa open-source a Firebase. Tema verde smeraldo scuro, orientato al codice.
description_i18n.vi: Giải pháp thay thế Firebase mã nguồn mở. Chủ đề ngọc lục bảo tối, ưu tiên code.
description_i18n.pl: Open-source'owa alternatywa dla Firebase. Ciemny szmaragdowy motyw, podejście code-first.
description_i18n.id: Alternatif Firebase open-source. Tema hijau zamrud gelap, mengutamakan kode.
description_i18n.nl: Open-source Firebase-alternatief. Donker smaragdgroen thema, code-first.
description_i18n.ar: بديل مفتوح المصدر لـ Firebase. ثيم أخضر زمردي داكن، يركز على الكود.
description_i18n.tr: Açık kaynaklı Firebase alternatifi. Koyu zümrüt teması, kod odaklı.
description_i18n.uk: Open-source альтернатива Firebase. Темна смарагдова тема, орієнтація на код.
description_i18n.en: Open-source Firebase alternative. Dark emerald theme, code-first.

query.en: Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Supabase design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Generate a {{artifactKind}} using the Supabase design system. Stay faithful to its colour palette, typography, spacing, iconography, and component vocabulary as documented in DESIGN.md.
